TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kndadax, title = Kndadax, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kndadax} }

S.FORM: kndadax自從 Kndadax ku slaqi seuxan do, smkuxul ku qmita patas kdjiyax da!
S.PHON: kndadax** kndadax ku slaqi səuxan do, smkuxul ku qmita patas kdɟijax da!
S.FORM: kndadax自從 Kndadax ku slaqi seuxan do, smkuxul ku qmita patas kdjiyax da!
S.PHON: kndadax** kndadax ku slaqi səuxan do, smkuxul ku qmita patas kdɟijax da!
